assertions.description: All 16 component references are correctly parsed: C501-C506, D501, FL501, J501, J502, PS501, PS502, R501, RV501, TH501, U501. The AMS1117-3.3 (U501) is correctly identified as an LDO regulator with +5V input and +3V3 output. The RV501 (varistor 10D561) is correctly classified as a varistor and listed in protection_devices. The isolated DC/DC converter PS501 (B0505S-1WR3, Mornsun) correctly outputs ISO_5V/ISO_GND as single_pin_nets (not connected to anything else in this sub-sheet — they connect via global labels to the CAN module). The HLK-5M05 AC/DC module PS502 is correctly parsed with its MPN. EMI filter FL501 (10mH) is correctly typed as 'filter'. The power supply tree (+5V from HLK-5M05 → AMS1117 → +3V3) is correctly captured.

The power_regulators section only contains U501 (AMS1117-3.3 LDO). PS502 (HLK-5M05) is a 220VAC-to-5VDC isolated switching power supply module and PS501 (B0505S-1WR3) is a 5V-in, 5V-out isolated DC/DC converter — neither is detected in power_regulators or any other signal_analysis section. These are major power conversion elements in the design. The design_observations also incorrectly flags U501 as missing decoupling capacitors on +5V and +3V3 rails when C501/C503 are present on +5V and C504/C505/C506 are on +3V3 — this is likely a net-topology traversal issue where the capacitors are not attributed to the correct rail.
